sourceRefs: DRAFT — c2.2 technique unit: écrire un roman. The incipit's three jobs (hook without explaining, plant place/era/characters, hide the perturbation clue), plot skeleton (situation initiale → élément perturbateur → péripéties → dénouement), narrative mode (je vs il, withholding information). Literary references limited to public-domain authors (Proust, Stendhal, Flaubert, Maupassant), described rather than quoted. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 12 'Utopies ?' ('Techniques pour écrire un roman', pp. 166-167 — incipit functions, lieux/personnages/époque, mode narratif). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
